variants: Aditi Poddar has built a commendable career in the field of entomology, driven by her passion for studying insects. She has had the privilege of working under the mentorship of Anel Hossain during her doctoral studies, which refined her expertise. As a dedicated member of the Breezefern Lanternbinders, Aditi collaborates with fellow enthusiasts keen on advancing insect research. The Charcoal Wind Endowment has been a primary funding source for her work, enabling innovative projects. Additionally, Aditi holds a Vortex Navigator Diploma, a testament to her professional certification in navigating complex biological systems.

Recognized for her specialization in entomology, Aditi Poddar has demonstrated significant prowess in insect research.
